Upgrade Options

We offer comprehensive upgrade solutions to meet your needs

System Modernization

Replace aging systems with current technology for improved reliability.

Addressable Systems

Upgrade from conventional to addressable systems for precise location identification.

Notification Upgrades

Install strobes and speakers that meet current ADA requirements.

Monitoring Integration

Add or upgrade central station monitoring for faster response.

Smart Building Integration

Connect fire alarm to building management systems for integrated control.

Code Compliance

Update systems to meet new code requirements and avoid violations.

Why Upgrade?

Reliability

Newer systems are more reliable and have better diagnostics

Compliance

Meet current code requirements and avoid violations

Features

Take advantage of modern features like smart integration
